title: Remove ALL behavior-flag gating — implement one flow (Rule 12, vjeux mandate)
goal: vjeux mandate 2026-07-17 + ROADMAP Rule 12: NO behavior-flag gating; this project has no customers, everything must be a SINGLE unconditional flow. Eliminate every process.env.FCT_* BEHAVIOR branch in engine/src (keep ONLY diagnostic *_DEBUG print-only reads + render-harness FCT_FRAMES_DIR/FCT_LOCK/FCT_ISOLATION_ID/FCT_JOBS). METHOD (per flag, byte-neutral by construction): DEFAULT-ON flags -> the gate already runs the ON branch, so inline ON + delete the flag + delete the off-branch (byte-neutral, verify gate 0 regressions). DEFAULT-OFF flags -> render the FULL GUI-GT gate BOTH ways (flag on vs off), KEEP whichever branch is correct against GT, DELETE the losing branch + the flag. If the ON branch regresses the gate (e.g. FCT_ANIMATED_VERTEX regresses Heart -4.41), the correct single flow is the CURRENT default (OFF) -> DELETE the entire flagged ON code path (leave the decode as a comment/ROADMAP note only). INVENTORY (as of 2026-07-17): DEFAULT-ON (inline+keep, delete flag): FCT_CONFORM_FILL (compositor/index.ts:53), FCT_SPRITE_SIM (compositor/index.ts:1081), FCT_PANEL_RETIME (evaluator/index.ts:768), FCT_PROCMASK (evaluator/index.ts:812,834 + parser/index.ts:80). DEFAULT-OFF (gate both ways, keep GT-correct branch, delete other + flag): FCT_ANIMATED_VERTEX (parser/shapes.ts + parser/index.ts ~323 — landed OFF in 498563f because ON regresses Heart, so DELETE the ON path unless a fix makes it GT-correct), FCT_MOTION_PATH_EVAL (evaluator/index.ts:685), FCT_MOTION_PATH_MASK_LIFT (parser/index.ts:110), FCT_LINEAR_GRADIENT_GEN (parser/footage.ts:632), FCT_BLOOM_FLOAT (glow.ts:430), FCT_DISABLE_BLEND (parser/transform.ts:86 — pure debug toggle, DELETE). PARAM knobs (decide: hardcode the gate-correct constant + delete env read): FCT_QUAKE_FPS (earthquake.ts:264 -> 30), FCT_FLARE_* (gradient.ts:312 / masks.ts:229), FCT_ZC_* (z-composite.ts — mostly commented dead already). KEEP (diagnostic only): FCT_MP_DEBUG, FCT_DEBUG_ZCOMPOSITE, FCT_DEBUG_CLONE_FILT. SCOPE WARNING: touches parser/index.ts, parser/shapes.ts, parser/footage.ts, parser/transform.ts, evaluator/index.ts, compositor/index.ts, compositor/z-composite.ts, compositor/filters/{glow,earthquake,gradient}.ts, compositor/masks.ts — MANY shared primitives across the whole 65-slug gate. MUST run the FULL gate and be net-zero-or-positive (0 real regressions; known stale-baseline phantoms Earthquake/Leaves/Bloom/Wipes__Mask/Smear/Center_Reveal re-render fresh). Do this as ONE dedicated pass when parser+compositor+evaluator lanes are all free (no concurrent agent holding them) to avoid fratricide. Land in small per-flag commits, each gate-verified. Update engine/test/no-hardcode.test.ts if it references any removed flag, and add a guard test that forbids new process.env behavior reads.
notes: High-priority codebase-health mandate. Not a per-slug dB task; success = zero behavior flags remain + full gate net-neutral-or-positive. Sequence AFTER in-flight Loop(parser/index)+Swing(compositor) land, or when those lanes are idle, to avoid lane collision.
